TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_West_sahara, title = West_sahara, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/West_sahara} }

S.FORM: West sahara Itini i 24 30 N, 13 00 W, noAfilika ko West sahara. Polong no sekalay i 266,000 sq km "saka 78 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 266,000 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 0 sq km " Polong i 587,020 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 18.80%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 2.70%, malo no roma to a sera 78.50%. siyoto O (((Laayoune)) ko Siyoto. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Brahim Ghali, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 9 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: w…ôst sańßara itini i ** ** n, ** ** w, no~uafi…ĺika ko~u w…ôst sańßara. po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u s…ôka…ĺaj i ***,*** s* km "saka ** ko~u rajraj no~u ŇčaŇčan. " "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, ***,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, * s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i ***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra *.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u (((…ĺaajo~uo~u~un…ô)) ko~u sijo~uto~u. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i b~b~vrańßim *ńßa…ĺi, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
S.FORM: West sahara Itini i 24 30 N, 13 00 W, noAfilika ko West sahara. Polong no sekalay i 266,000 sq km "saka 78 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 266,000 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 0 sq km " Polong i 587,020 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 18.80%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 2.70%, malo no roma to a sera 78.50%. siyoto O (((Laayoune)) ko Siyoto. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Brahim Ghali, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 9 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

" "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, ***,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, * s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i ***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra *.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u (((…ĺaajo~uo~u~un…ô)) ko~u sijo~uto~u. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i b~b~vrańßim *ńßa…ĺi, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
